operations.summary: Get a specific zone
operations.notes: Get the zone with the specified ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the zone to get.

responseMessages.message: The zone was retrieved successfully.
User is not permitted to access the specified domain
A zone with the specified ID does not exist.

operations.summary: Modify a zone
operations.notes: Modify an existing zone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the zone to modify.

responseMessages.message: The specified zone was successfully modified.
User is not permitted to access the specified domain
A zone with the specified ID was not found.
The zone parameters were invalid

operations.summary: Set internet representing address value for network simulations.
operations.notes:
Internet representing address will be used for network path simulation when:
(1) An access request uses Internet object as either a source or a destination
(2) An access request uses Url Category as a destination and no Url-Category zone is defined.

responseMessages.message: Internet representing address was set successfully.
Internet representing address parameter was invalid or missing
User is not permitted to set internet representing address

operations.summary: Get internet representing address value for network simulations.
operations.notes:
Internet representing address will be used for network path simulation when:
(1) An access request uses Internet object as either a source or a destination
(2) An access request uses Url Category as a destination and no Url-Category zone is defined.

responseMessages.message: Internet representing address was retrieved successfully.

parameters.description: Number of pages to return for the query, starting from the specified starting page.

User is not permitted to access the specified domain

URL category zone entries will be used for network path simulation when an access request uses URL Category as a destination.

operations.summary: Map network elements to security zones
operations.notes:
This API maps each network element in the AccessRequestNetworkListDTO (such as IP address, IP address range, object, or group) to all matching Tufin security zones. If the network element is a group, then each zone also identifies all matching group members. The internet referral object can be included in the list, and will always map to the predefined Internet security zone. If the 'Any' element is included in the list it will map to all zones.
Note: if multi-domain mode is enabled, the API calls only checks zones that are in the "Default" domain.

responseMessages.message: Returns mapping of network elements to security zones
Access Request Network List is malformed.
Access is denied.
